## Contract

Describe the observable behavior changed and the deterministic evidence that
remains authoritative.

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant unit and integration tests pass.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check` passes.
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --locked -- -D warnings` passes.
- [ ] Real assets/hardware were tested when inference or packaging changed.
- [ ] Prompt/schema/version identifiers were bumped when their contract changed.
- [ ] Documentation and release notes describe user-visible behavior.

## Risk

List unsupported platforms, performance uncertainty, migration impact, or
follow-up work. State `None` only when there is no residual risk.
